notes: projected_sd   = v6.1_per_game_sd * sqrt(playoff_MPG / RS_MPG) * per-minute_playoff_multiplier (Poisson-like sd scaling).
playoff_MPG = player's 25-26 R1 average minutes/game (from playoffs/round1/traditional_t0+t1). RS_MPG = v6.1 ship's `mpg` column.

Per-minute playoff multiplier was derived from the 22-25 R1-R4 backtest's playoff_mult_loo, which was computed as sum(actual)/sum(per_min*actual_minutes) and therefore measures the per-minute regime shift (not per-game).
Active cohort = players with >=1 minute in 25-26 R1 + present in v6.1 ship.
n_playoff_games_prior = count of 25-26 playoff games the player has appeared in (R1 + extra_rounds when fetched).

min_avg field populated with playoff_MPG for forward-compat with E2 teammate-out uplift; current recommend.py line 110 hard-codes None for the projection branch so the field is currently dead-letter until that patch lands.
Re-run daily with --date <YYYY-MM-DD>; recommend.py picks up the per-date file automatically.
